recommendations.title: A Turtle's Tale 2: Sammy's Escape from Paradise
recommendations.overview: When Sammy and Ray find themselves trapped in The Tank, an underwater aquarium, they must hatch a plan to escape and reunite with their grandkids, Ricky and Ella, and protect them from the dangers of the ocean.

recommendations.title: Fly Me to the Moon
recommendations.overview: Three young houseflies stow away aboard the Apollo 11 flight to the moon.

recommendations.title: The Fabelmans
recommendations.overview: Growing up in post-World War II era Arizona, young Sammy Fabelman aspires to become a filmmaker as he reaches adolescence, but soon discovers a shattering family secret and explores how the power of films can help him see the truth.

recommendations.title: Cats Don't Dance
recommendations.overview: An ambitious singing and dancing cat in 1939 Hollywood overcomes several obstacles to fulfill his dream of becoming a movie star.
